events.event_description: Diplomatic relations were established on August 6, 1992, but no physical mission or ambassador was yet in place.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 6, 1992, when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision during remarks to the press.

events.event_description: A physical American Embassy to Bosnia and Herzegovina was established on November 10, 1993, on the premises of the American Embassy in Vienna, Austria — not yet in the capital Sarajevo.

evidence.quote: a physical American Embassy to Bosnia and Herzegovina was not established until November 10, 1993, on the premises of the American Embassy in Vienna, Austria.

events.event_description: The American Embassy in Sarajevo (the capital) was established on July 4, 1994, with Jackovich as Ambassador.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Sarajevo was established on July 4, 1994, with Jackovich as Ambassador.
